text: Deployment architecture: Git-based, self-host + optional cloud sync
description:
File-based storage is correct for git tracking!

Architecture options:
1. Open source self-hosting (Docker compose, VPS)
2. Optional cloud sync service (sync .bowman/ to server for backup/collaboration)
3. Git-based merging for collaboration (conflicts resolved through git workflow)

Questions to resolve:
- Full open source or partial?
- Pricing model for cloud sync?
- How to handle merge conflicts in aims/phases?

File-based stays, this is about deployment + optional services on top
